name: Peppered Hungarians
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pimentos, chopped or 1 can of pimentos (4 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the partridges and season with salt and pepper.
2. Roll each bird in flour.
3. Heat oil in a deep skillet.
4. Brown the halves of the partridges on both sides.
5. Add garlic and onions to the skillet as they are browning.
6. Place the birds in a Dutch oven or deep casserole.
7. Add the remaining ingredients: more oil, garlic, onions, green peppers, dry sherry, pimentos (either chopped or from a can), and water.
8. Cook for approximately 45 minutes, or until the partridges are tender.
